sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَتْ مَرْيَمُ إِلَى السُّوقِ الشَّعْبِيِّ لِتَشْتَرِيَ الْخُضْرَاوَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Merjem je otišla na narodnu pijacu da kupi povrće.
sentences.translationEn: Maryam went to the popular market to buy vegetables.

sentences.arabic: وَجَدَتْ طَمَاطِمَ حَمْرَاءَ وَخِيَارًا طَازَجًا فِي كُلِّ مَكَانٍ.
sentences.translation: Svuda je pronašla crveni paradajz i svježe krastavce.
sentences.translationEn: She found red tomatoes and fresh cucumbers everywhere.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ رَائِحَةُ التَّوَابِلِ وَالْبُهُورَاتِ الْقَوِيَّةِ تَمْلَأُ الزِّقَاقَ.
sentences.translation: Jak miris začina je ispunjavao uličicu.
sentences.translationEn: The strong scent of spices filled the alleyway.

sentences.arabic: اشْتَرَتْ كُلَّ مَا تَحْتَاجُ إِلَيْهِ لِتَحْضِيرِ طَعَامِ الْغَدَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Kupila je sve što joj je potrebno za pripremu ručka.
sentences.translationEn: She bought everything she needed to prepare lunch.
